description: Detect coordinated manipulation patterns including channel stuffing, cookie jar reserves, round-tripping, and Benford's Law violations across 8 quarters.
expected_anomalies: 5-10 anomalies including coordinated multi-quarter fraud patterns with causal dependencies
footnotes: Company completed a major product launch in Q4 2022.
Management revised Q2 2023 estimates due to market conditions.
All amounts in USD. Fiscal year ends December 31.
Auditor noted a material weakness in internal controls over financial reporting.
